title: zyrphelis lasiocarpa
intro: Zyrphelis lasiocarpa, also known as Western woolly bear, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Zyrphelis lasiocarpa include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
